summary: Added the existing `nix develop -c just security` supply-chain gate to the nightly `deep-checks` workflow before coverage and mutation checks, leaving PR and main CI unchanged.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Nightly deep checks run `nix develop -c just security` before long-running coverage or mutation steps.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: .github/workflows/nightly.yml now runs `nix develop -c just security` immediately after Nix setup and before `nix develop -c just coverage` and `nix develop -c just mutants`.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: PR and main CI behavior remains unchanged.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml was inspected and not modified; the existing PR, push-to-main, merge_group, workflow_call, and workflow_dispatch CI steps remain unchanged.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Evidence records focused security, workflow lint, and repo check commands.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: commands.log records `nix develop -c just security`, `nix develop -c actionlint .github/workflows/*.yml`, `nix develop -c just check`, and `git diff --check`.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim is made.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Only workflow scheduling/evidence files were changed; notes.md records the no-product-claim boundary.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node only changes scheduled repository workflow gate ordering.
